##RRUFFID=R070202
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Na_3_Ca(SiO_3_)(PO_4_)
##LOCALITY=Tsentrainly mine, Rasvumchorr Mt, Khibiny Massif, Kola Peninsula, Murmanskaja Oblast', Northern Region, Russia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Pale pink massive, associated with red platy lamprophyllite and eudialyte. Note that our a-cell parameter is doubled that reported, and our crystal is twinned by a 2-fold around [100]
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070202
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 14.5751 b: 12.1914 c: 14.6848 alpha: 90 beta: 91.947 gamma: 90 volume: 2607.9 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
